Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Robert Anthony is represented by Susan Balistock and appears with her. Respondent, Cory Jacobs appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Grotch.

No documents are marked as evidence.

10:00am
